intent: We are not building the Forge Agent architecture. We are building a Mac Consensus Dev Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture.
scope_statement:
Build the Crafted Dev Agent — a native macOS AI coding agent that uses consensus AI (Claude + GPT-4o in parallel, Claude arbitrating) to develop high-quality software autonomously from TRD/PRD specifications. The system comprises a two-process architecture: a Swift/SwiftUI shell (UI, Touch ID, Keychain, XPC) and a Python 3.12 backend (ConsensusEngine, BuildPipeline, GitHubTool, DocumentStore, BuildLedger, HolisticReview, TRDWorkflow, BuildMemory, BuildRulesEngine), communicating via an authenticated Unix socket with line-delimited JSON, delivering a confidence-gated scope → PRD decomposition → PR generation → self-correction → lint gate → 20-pass fix loop → CI gate → operator approval pipeline as specified across all 16 TRDs.

Clarifications:
  - we building the Crafted Dev Agent itself from its own TRDs
  - confirmed the full 16 trds are in scope
  - Anywhere there is ambiguity in the trds ensure the PRDs contain the resolution
  - Anywhere there is ambiguity in the trds ensure the PRDs contain the resolution. This can be resolved during the build
  - We are focusing on the Mac build for now
  - Anywhere there is ambiguity in the trds ensure the PRDs contain the resolution
